channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 3 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 9 novas CVEs
• 1 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-8430 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
SPIP versions prior to 4.4.14 contain a remote code execution vulnerability in the public space that is limited to certain nginx configurations, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary code in the context of the web server. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability through specific nginx configuration scenarios to achieve code execution, and this issue is not mitigated by the SPIP security screen.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8430
 
🚨 CVE-2026-31215 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The nexent v1.7.5.2 backend service contains an unauthorized arbitrary file deletion vulnerability in its ElasticSearch service interface. The DELETE /{index_name}/documents endpoint lacks proper authentication and authorization controls and does not validate the user-supplied path_or_url parameter. This allows unauthenticated remote attackers to send crafted requests that trigger the deletion of arbitrary documents...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31215
 
📰 Maximizing Profitability: VCF 9.1 Cost-Focused Approach for VMware Cloud Service Providers
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1 is designed to meet the challenges faced by VMware Cloud Service Providers (VCSPs) like rising operational costs, the need for infrastructure optimization, and financial transparency among clients. The new release includes significant cost-focused enhancements for infrastructure economics and operational efficiency, driving lower total cost of ownership (TCO) as well as …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/13/maximizing-profitability-vcf-9-1-for-vmware-cloud-service-providers/
 
📰 Modernizing Your Infrastructure: Introducing VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1 to VCSPs
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Today’s VMware Cloud Service Providers (VCSPs) are navigating a tough balancing act. Customers expect seamless self-service experiences, businesses need to scale efficiently without driving up operational costs, and financial transparency has become a must-have. That’s why VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1 is such an important release. Built specifically with VCSPs in mind, VCF 9.1 goes …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/12/introducing-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-1-to-vcsps/
 
📰 VCF 9.1 is Available: Explore the New Features in Hands-on Labs
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1 has officially hit General Availability, bringing a massive leap forward in scale, operational clarity, and infrastructure efficiency. At VMware Hands-on Labs, our mission is to put you in the driver’s seat the moment the tech drops. We know you don’t just want release notes—you want to …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/12/vcf-9-1-is-available-explore-the-new-features-in-hands-on-labs/
 
📰 NIST Narrows the NVD: What Container Security Programs Should Reassess
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
On April 15, NIST announced a prioritized enrichment model for the National Vulnerability Database. Most CVEs will still be published, but fewer will receive the CVSS scores, CPE mappings, and CWE classifications that container scanners and compliance programs have historically relied on. The change formalizes a drift that has been visible to anyone pulling NVD...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/nist-narrows-the-nvd-what-container-security-programs-should-reassess/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 New Exim BDAT Vulnerability Exposes GnuTLS Builds to Potential Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Exim has released security updates to address a severe security issue affecting certain configurations that could enable memory corruption and potential code execution. Exim is an open-source Mail Transfer Agent (MTA) designed for Unix-like systems to receive, route, and deliver email. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-45185, aka Dead.Letter, has been described as a use-after-free
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/new-exim-bdat-vulnerability-exposes.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-43500: Falha de Escalada de Privilégios Dirty Frag no Linux - SOC Prime
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-43500 associada a Qualys. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMieEFVX3lxTE1USXRoNkJTd1VMM1JpUkR6RGszUEtwMUl0YzRrSWc2M3VQamdfRTNFSDBOMm9kNW1wMTBLRGdBOFZoOGRob0JzSmE2MjRwaV9YZHlRY1JhelkwMjRpTDZqRERseGxvM2diVzF6WnFHbkxDUTJaMEkwYQ?oc=5
 
💣 Most Remediation Programs Never Confirm the Fix Actually Worked
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Security teams have never had better visibility into their environments and never been worse at confirming what they fix stays fixed. Mandiant's M-Trends 2026 report puts the mean time to exploit at an estimated negative seven days. The Verizon 2025 DBIR puts median time to remediate edge device vulnerabilities at 32 days. These numbers have understandably driven the industry toward a clear
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/most-remediation-programs-never-confirm.html
 
📰 Fortinet warns of critical RCE flaws in FortiSandbox and FortiAuthenticator
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Fortinet has released security patches for two critical vulnerabilities in FortiSandbox and FortiAuthenticator that could enable attackers to run commands or arbitrary code.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/fortinet-warns-of-critical-rce-flaws-in-fortisandbox-and-fortiauthenticator/
 
📰 73 Seconds to Breach, 24 Hours to Patch: The Case for Autonomous Validation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers can compromise systems in minutes while patching and response still take hours or days. Picus Security breaks down why autonomous validation is becoming critical for modern defense strategies.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/73-seconds-to-breach-24-hours-to-patch-the-case-for-autonomous-validation/
 
📰 Foxconn confirms cyberattack claimed by Nitrogen ransomware gang
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Foxconn, the world's largest electronics manufacturer, says some of its North American factories are now working to resume normal operations after a cyberattack.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/electronics-giant-foxconn-confirms-cyberattack-on-north-american-factories/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8268-1: Dnsmasq vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 6.0
Resumo:
Fasano, Royce M, and Hugo Martinez Ray discovered that Dnsmasq did not allocate the necessary space to store domain names in some contexts. An attacker could possibly use this issue to write out-of-bounds, and could cause a denial of service or execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-2291) Royce M discovered that Dnsmasq could loop infinitely due to erroneously missing the window header. An attacker could possibly use this...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8268-1
 
📰 Microsoft Patches Critical Zero-Click Outlook Vulnerability Threatening Enterprises - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Office, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Disgruntled researcher strikes Microsoft again: drops BitLocker bypass and privilege escalation zero-days - Cybernews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação aborda uma vulnerabilidade de elevação de privilégio envolvendo Windows Server, o que pode ampliar o impacto de um comprometimento inicial.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxOUG0yVnVYUnVtWDB3M25kYzk2UTkwcV9LSFZGcnFfR1V5WUxHX1NicFVlZ3BsajNyLVVhZXFNMDVBRks5TlZXODgteUYwNlNsZVpyRkJDOWgwZXNSYjlfOG12dTNwRVRGTWNFcFNWVzJNUUw1dElVY2RPVTd1Vkk0WXo1MjViWlV4UXpYSnVnc1NMMzBOWEVsR3U0cVc5OG9zVEdZ?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft Teams Vulnerability Allows Hackers to Perform Spoofing Attacks - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft May 2026 Patch Tuesday: Many fixes, but no zero-days - Help Net Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxOM0Z4dmJsVC1jRS1Jc1lYbXcyUnFWaEltMUs5UnFVRnNSUTRuVTdwcGNJT0d6X0xiWm1xaTM4ZWEwQ3NGTHRtV21MT1BEUm1LcG1sNUptWFFEUnQ5RzFlbDZ2VjE2QmQ3cXRKT0g4VUNLUXJlaHFiRUNlS1NTRWk2MFVR?oc=5
 
📰 Doozy of a Patch Tuesday includes 30 critical Microsoft CVEs - The Register
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitgFBVV95cUxNQzJ3OURSaGdBcXhTLU00X0JvQVZjQ1NqcUdwYXZUWW8wZ3AxNGh2WWNMaTRmcmF1V2FPN0dIWlVNY2xmeGIxeVgtdVJhYkVkbFlsVDVNeEZ1ZzhtWjNCN1l6TmF6eHJnMXd4NFZXa3J3MThldU8yaE9kS0hPTHZ4cGpCbm1oQU5fMjk3TlNVbW5jWnBxcVBINktPRFl2QWdwRWJuaWZsbTd6cXFEQ2NCV2UwaENOUQ?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 12/05/2026 e 13/05/2026.
